summary: Backend-only testing for BarberBook. All 27 pytest cases passed (100% success). Covered auth (register/login/me + duplicate email + wrong password), services CRUD with RBAC (admin create/delete, client/barber 403), barbers (admin create with QR base64 + list + get by id + RBAC), bookings (create, prevent double-booking, available-slots generation and exclusion of booked times, role-based filtering for client/barber/admin, status update, prepaid vs onsite payment_status, invalid service 404). Payment integration is intentionally MOCKED (payment_status derived from payment_method) per user requirement. QR codes are generated as data:image/png;base64 strings. Mongo _id is properly excluded from responses.

minor.issue: Passing a malformed (non-ObjectId) service_id or barber_id will raise bson.errors.InvalidId and return HTTP 500 instead of 400. Wrap ObjectId(...) calls in try/except across all endpoints (services delete, barbers get, bookings update) for cleaner validation.
Uses deprecated datetime.utcnow() and pydantic .dict(); consider datetime.now(timezone.utc) and .model_dump() for pydantic v2 compatibility.
@app.on_event('shutdown') is deprecated in FastAPI; migrate to lifespan context manager.
JWT_SECRET_KEY falls back to a hard-coded default 'your-secret-key-change-in-production'. For production, fail-fast if the env var is missing.

action_items: (Optional / minor) Wrap ObjectId() conversions in try/except to return 400 for malformed IDs instead of 500.
(Optional / minor) Migrate deprecated FastAPI/Pydantic/datetime APIs (on_event, .dict(), utcnow).
(Optional / security) Remove hard-coded fallback for JWT_SECRET_KEY and require it via env var.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 538 lines — approaching the 700-line threshold. Consider splitting into modules (routes/auth.py, routes/services.py, routes/barbers.py, routes/bookings.py, deps.py, models.py) as more endpoints are added.
All routes correctly use /api prefix and RBAC via require_role dependency.
MongoDB _id is properly stringified into 'id' fields — no ObjectId leaks in responses (verified in tests).
Payment is MOCKED as specified in the problem statement (payment_status='paid' when prepaid, else 'pending').
seed_data_creation: Test fixtures create TEST_-prefixed clients and barbers on the fly per session. No production data modified. Seeded admin (admin@barberbook.com) and 4 seeded services were used as-is.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend API surface for BarberBook is validated. Test suite at /app/backend/tests/test_backend_api.py (27 cases) exercises all major endpoints and RBAC. Uses EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL from /app/frontend/.env. Admin credentials: admin@barberbook.com / admin123. When testing frontend, note the env var is EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL (not EXPO_BACKEND_URL). Payment integration is intentionally MOCKED — no real Stripe. QR codes returned as data:image/png;base64,... strings ready to render in <Image source={{uri: qr_code}}>.
rca_of_issue: N/A — no bugs found in backend implementation. All requested features work correctly.
